# Diagram: research/orchestrator/scripts/check_cluster_count.py


> Auto-generated by Obscura crawlers

## Diagram 1

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([Start]) --> InitEMR[Initialize EMR client]
    InitEMR --> CheckProcess[Run ps aux to check for running tasks]
    CheckProcess --> Decision{Process returncode?}
    Decision -->|returncode == 0| TaskRunning[Print: task is running - do nothing]
    Decision -->|returncode == 1| NoTask[Print: no task running - scale down]
    TaskRunning --> End([End])
    NoTask --> GetCluster[Get environment cluster]
    GetCluster --> GetNodeCount[Get node count]
    GetNodeCount --> ListGroups[List instance groups]
    ListGroups --> FilterCore[Filter CORE instance group]
    FilterCore --> ExtractInfo[Extract core group details:<br/>ID, type, count, requested count]
    ExtractInfo --> BuildDict[Build scale_dict with parameters]
    BuildDict --> ScaleDown[Call scale_cluster with allow_scale_down=True]
    ScaleDown --> End
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Main
    participant Subprocess
    participant Boto3
    participant EMR
    participant ScaleEMR

    Main->>Boto3: Create EMR client
    Main->>Subprocess: Run ps aux command
    Subprocess-->>Main: Return code
    alt returncode == 0
        Main->>Main: Print task is running
    else returncode == 1
        Main->>ScaleEMR: get_env_cluster()
        ScaleEMR-->>Main: cluster
        Main->>ScaleEMR: get_node_count(emrconn, cluster['Id'])
        ScaleEMR-->>Main: node_count
        Main->>EMR: list_instance_groups(ClusterId)
        EMR-->>Main: instance_groups
        Main->>Main: Filter CORE group
        Main->>Main: Extract core group details
        Main->>Main: Build scale_dict
        Main->>ScaleEMR: scale_cluster(scale_dict, allow_scale_down=True)
    end
```
